title: Shoals Technologies Group Inc (SHLS) Q1 2024 Earnings Call Transcript Highlights: Navigating Market Disruptions
text: Shoals Technologies reported Q1 2024 financial performance. Revenue declined 14% year-over-year to $90.8 million. Gross Profit decreased to $36.5 million from $48.3 million in prior year. Net Income was $4.8 million, down from $17.0 million. Adjusted EBITDA was $20.5 million versus $38.1 million previously. The company projects 2024 revenue between $440-490 million and adjusted EBITDA of $130-150 million. A strong backlog of $615.2 million represents 17% year-over-year growth. The company stated it aims to grow wallet share with large EPC customers through reorganized sales efforts targeting expansion opportunities. Management acknowledged unusual project cancellations and delays, with approximately $60 million in orders returning to the sales pipeline. Industry headwinds include permitting delays and financing constraints affecting utility-scale solar projects. Shoals is developing dedicated resources for the Community Commercial and Industrial market, anticipating some market traction by late 2024, with more significant progress in 2025.
